common.tagline: Secure Saudi-built video meetings for modern teams and organizations.

footer.tagline: Q Meet — secure Arabic-first video meetings.

hero.headline: Secure video meetings for modern organizations
hero.subheadline: Q Meet is a professional video meeting platform built for secure, Arabic-first collaboration.

landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for professional meetings

features.title: High-quality video meetings
features.description: Clear audio and video for distributed and in-office teams.

features.title: Screen sharing
features.description: Present slides and documents seamlessly during calls.

features.title: Secure rooms with invite links
features.description: Invite participants with signed, time-limited links.

features.title: Host permissions
features.description: Control participants and settings from the host interface.

features.title: Arabic RTL interface
features.description: Native right-to-left experience for Arabic teams.

features.title: English support
features.description: Seamless switching between Arabic and English.

features.title: Session protection
features.description: Access tokens are minted server-side, never exposed in the browser.

features.title: Audit logs
features.description: Track platform events for compliance and review.

features.title: Education, consulting & enterprise
features.description: Flexible for internal meetings, training, and clients.

whyItems: Built for Arabic users — native RTL and Arabic as the default language
Saudi-first product mindset — designed for regional teams and organizations
Privacy-first — platform secrets never stored in the browser
Professional UI — simple for non-technical teams
No unnecessary complexity — start your meeting quickly
Full English support for bilingual teams

useCases.title: Consulting
useCases.description: Client sessions and remote project work.

landing.securityIntro: Q Meet is built with security in mind from day one: secure sessions, clear permissions, API protection, audit logs, and no user secrets stored in the browser.
securityItems: Secrets never exposed to the browser

finalCta.title: Start secure video meetings for your organization.

pricing.freeSubtitle: Use Q Meet for video meetings without a paid subscription during this stage.
pricing.enterpriseNote: For large organizations — contact us for future enterprise options.

joinCode.title: Join with meeting code
joinCode.subtitle: Enter a meeting code to join without a full link

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Set up your company account and start secure meetings.
signup.freeNote: Q Meet is completely free for now — no payment required.
signup.errorGeneric: Could not create account. Check your details and try again.

errors.DATABASE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Signup requires a configured database. Please set DATABASE_URL.
errors.DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE: Could not connect to the database.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.INVALID_INPUT: Please check the information you entered.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.SERVICE_NOT_CONFIGURED: The service is not fully configured. Contact your administrator.
errors.UNEXPECTED_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

contactSales.title: Contact sales
contactSales.subtitle: Tell us about your organization's needs and we'll get back to you soon.
contactSales.name: Name
contactSales.emailFallback: You can also reach us directly at the email below.
contactSales.error: Could not submit your request. Please try again.
contactSales.successHint: Our team will contact you shortly.

plans.title: Free access
plans.subtitle: Q Meet is completely free for now — use it for video meetings at no cost during this stage.

securityPage.title: Security & trust
securityPage.intro: Q Meet is designed to reduce risk and raise the security bar — from sessions to infrastructure.
securityPage.disclaimer: We do not claim any system is "unhackable." We commit to clear, reviewable security practices.

items.title: Secure by design
items.description: Security is embedded in every layer: authentication, media, and APIs.

items.title: Server-side LiveKit tokens
items.description: The server mints short-lived, least-privilege access tokens — no secrets in the browser.

items.title: Role-based permissions
items.description: Platform and organization roles define what each user can do.

items.title: Input validation
items.description: All client input passes through Zod schemas before processing.

items.title: Rate limiting
items.description: Auth and token endpoints are protected from abuse.

items.title: Audit logs
items.description: Platform events are recorded for review without storing meeting content.

items.title: HTTPS deployment
items.description: Ready to deploy behind TLS with strict security headers.

items.title: Privacy-first
items.description: Data minimization and no sensitive secrets stored on the client.

dashboard.freeBannerHint: Use Q Meet for video meetings without a paid subscription during this stage.
dashboard.noRooms: No rooms yet — create your first meeting.
dashboard.securityOk: Your sessions are protected with server tokens and encrypted transport.

join.title: Join meeting
join.displayNamePlaceholder: Enter your name as others will see it
join.joinAsGuestNote: You will join as a guest via a valid invite link
join.joinAsMemberNote: You will join with your account: {name}
join.invalidInvite: Invite link is invalid or expired
join.invalidInviteHint: Ask the meeting organizer for a new invite link, or sign in if you have an account.
join.permissionsNote: Camera and microphone permissions are handled by your browser — your devices are never accessed without your explicit consent.
join.permissionDenied: Camera or microphone permission was denied. You can change this in your browser settings.
join.joinFailed: Could not join the meeting. Please try again.

room.configErrorHint: The meeting service is currently unavailable. Contact your administrator.
room.switchCameraUnsupported: Camera switching is not supported on this device
room.cameraSwitchFailed: Could not switch camera on this device
room.screenShareUnsupportedMobile: Screen sharing is not supported by this mobile browser. Try from desktop or a dedicated mobile app later.
room.noMessages: No messages yet — start the conversation
room.meetingEndedHint: Thanks for joining. You can head back to the home page.
room.connectionFailed: Couldn't connect to the meeting server
room.connectionFailedHint: Check your internet connection and try again. If the problem persists, contact your administrator.

landingSupport.title: Need help?
landingSupport.subtitle: Reach our team for enterprise setup, support, or questions about Q Meet.
